requirements.text: Given I am logged in, when I enter a valid card and save it, then the card is stored securely.
Given I have no saved payment methods, when I attempt to checkout, then I am prompted to add a payment card.
The saved card must expire after 3 years and require CVV entry for verification.

business_rules: Payment card data must be encrypted at rest.
The saved card must expire after 3 years.
Card verification must require CVV entry.
preconditions: User has no saved payment methods.
postconditions: User is prompted to add a payment card when no saved payment methods exist.
validation_rules: Payment card data encryption at rest is required.
